sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7435" key="a)narxai/+zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναρχᾰΐζω</orth>, <sense id="n7435.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bring back to old ways,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πόλιν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.707</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
